options.name: -create_area_per_gate
options.description: Specifies area per gate in square micron.

options.name: -create_extra_macro
options.description: Specifies the additional macros to be added to the original netlist.

options.name: -create_gate_area
options.description: Specifies total area of gates. This value does not include macro area.

options.name: -create_total_area
options.description: Specifies the model area that includes standard cell area and macro area.

options.name: -planDesign_target_util
options.description: Specifies target utilization value will be used by planDesign to derive initial size of the model.

options.name: -reset
options.description: Resets parameters to their default values. If you specify -reset by itself, the software resets all set_proto_model parameters to their default values. If you specify parameters after -reset, the software resets only those parameters to their default values.
